description: JSON schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter — validates the existing required fields and the five optional metadata fields added in issue #177.

name.description: Canonical skill identifier (matches the directory name under .claude/skills/)

description.description: One-line summary used by the skill router to decide whether this skill applies

argument-hint.description: Human-readable hint for the argument(s) the skill accepts, shown in skill listings

inputs.description: Explicit contract for what the skill consumes; enables a meta-skill to validate args before invocation

type.description: Data type of the input (e.g. string, integer, url, boolean, file_path)

required.description: Whether this input is required; defaults to false if omitted

description.description: What the input represents and how it is used

outputs.description: Explicit contract for what consumers can rely on; enables piping skill outputs into other skills

type.description: Data type of the output (e.g. string, integer, url, boolean, file_path, json)

description.description: What the output represents and where it can be found

side_effects.description: Declares what changes outside the conversation (files written, issues created, processes spawned) so a dry-run skill can predict impact

oneOf.description: Named side effect with no extra detail (e.g. 'creates_github_issue')
Named side effect with an associated path or value (e.g. {writes_log: 'logs/foo/status.json'})

composes.description: Names sub-skills invoked via the Skill tool; enables a graph of skill dependencies

items.description: Skill name as it appears in the skills directory (e.g. 'mcp-tools', 'explore')

failure_modes.description: Known ways this skill can fail and what callers should do; enables a pipeline-recovery skill to take action

id.description: Short snake_case identifier for the failure mode (e.g. 'gh_api_unauthorized')

mitigation.description: What the skill or its caller should do when this failure occurs

golden.description: Golden test configuration for decision skills — declares the model, manifest path, fixture directory, and output schema used by skill-golden.sh

model.description: Model tier to use for golden test runs (e.g. haiku, sonnet)

manifest.description: Path to the golden manifest file (relative to repo root) listing fixture|expected_route|expected_criterion entries

fixture_dir.description: Path to the directory containing fixture files (relative to repo root)

schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file used to validate Claude's structured output (relative to repo root). Falls back to .claude/scripts/schemas/<skill-name>.json when omitted.
